input.background: We propose to draw boxplots for the air sample data presented in prior illustrations (see Table 4.2).
input.question: Compare the side-by-side boxplots for site 1 and site 2. What do they reveal about the central locations and spreads?

output.answer: Figure 4.5 shows the boxplot for site 1 on the left and site 2 on the right. The side-by-side boxplots in this figure show site 1 and site 2 have similar central locations but different spreads.
